name: Peanut Blossoms/hershey's
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Reese's Creamy or Crunchy Peanut Butter
recipeInstructions:
Heat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit. Remove wrappers from chocolate pieces. In a large mixing bowl, beat shortening and peanut butter until well blended. Add 1/3 cup granulated sugar and brown sugar; beat until light and fluffy. Add egg, milk, and vanilla; beat well. Stir together flour, baking soda, and salt; gradually add to peanut butter mixture. Shape dough into 1-inch balls. Roll in granulated sugar; place on an ungreased cookie sheet. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes or until lightly browned. Immediately place a chocolate piece on top of each cookie, pressing down so the cookie cracks around the edges. Remove from cookie sheet to a wire rack. Cool completely. About 4 dozen cookies.
